SQLite amalgamation 3.53.3 (sqlite-amalgamation-3530300)
Source: https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-amalgamation-3530300.zip
License: public domain (https://www.sqlite.org/copyright.html)
Vendored for Milestone 7. Only sqlite3.c / sqlite3.h / sqlite3ext.h are kept
(the CLI shell.c is intentionally omitted). Compiled directly into libcytadel.
